title: Certificate of correction
doc_html:
§35.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Added by Acts 1982, No. 442, §1, eff. July 21, 1982.  Acts 1989, No. 612, §1, eff. July 6, 1989; Acts 1999, No. 342, §5; Acts 2001, No. 1187, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
§35.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
Added by Acts 1982, No. 442, §1, eff. July 21, 1982.  Acts 1989, No. 612, §1, eff. July 6, 1989; Acts 1999, No. 342, §5; Acts 2001, No. 1187, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
